content:
Stevan Andric

Posted on Jul 1

#analytics
#webdev
#javascript
#marketing

Just shipped Page Groups - you can now group URLs like /news/, /blog/, /products/* and see which individual pages within each group get the most traffic.

No more scrolling through 30 separate blog posts in your top pages list.

Set up patterns in seconds, no data is duplicated, and removing a group just ungroups the pages back to normal.

identity-js.com
